message:
test(pt-core): extend pattern persistence coverage with 70 new inline tests (process_triage-aii.7)

Cover lifecycle state machine (transitions, boundaries, serde), pattern
source properties, stats Laplace smoothing + acceptance rates,
PersistedPattern/Schema creation and roundtrips, DisabledPatterns CRUD,
AllPatternStats recording, PatternLibrary CRUD (add/remove/disable/enable,
learned update, built-in protection, duplicate prevention, dirty flag,
search order, priority sorting), import with all 4 conflict strategies,
lifecycle step-by-step promotion, and schema migration. Total: 77 tests (was 7).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
